query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `system_config` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `chave` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `valor` TEXT,
  `tipo` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'string',
  `grupo` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'geral',
  `descricao` VARCHAR(300),
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dWo49LZM7B1Gvy.e54432474310 --database S6kXiUs3wP8DTXUNAceZmN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `system_config` (

  `chave` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `valor` TEXT,
  `tipo` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'string',
  `grupo` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'geral',
  `descricao` VARCHAR(300),
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
